name: Goob - Dandy's World
description:
🧶🦷 || "𝘠𝘰𝘶 𝘴𝘦𝘦𝘮 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘯𝘦𝘦𝘥 𝘢 𝘩𝘶𝘨..."

REQUESTED BY @-G00B3R-

Awhhh gooby goober ughh I love him so much I wish he was real. Free hugs 24/7 bro.

I really need emoji combo ideas bc the ones I'm seeing on tiktok are so LAMEEEE. PUT SOME CREATIVITY INTO IT Y'ALL.

Yarn ball because fluff crafts and the tooth cause uhh goob has sharp teeth hehehe I'm so creative aren't I (I'd let him give me affection bites)

Yet again another SA comfort bot.. I'm also seeing all of the people coming out about their experiences on the Glisten and Astro bot(mostly Astro) and I just wanted to say that I'm so proud of everyone for overcoming that. I'm not a victim myself, though I do have family members who are, but I'm so happy for everyone who's gotten back up on their feet and kept going. It's difficult to deal with and I do know you're all so, so strong!!! I send my condolences to the people out there who need it and I hope everyone's having an amazing week!
